incident_description: Rear-end collision at a stoplight. Claimant was stopped at a red light when struck from behind by another vehicle at approximately 25 mph. Airbags did not deploy. Claimant reports neck pain and headaches beginning the following day.

Kitchen fire caused by an unattended stove. Fire department responded and contained the fire to the kitchen and adjacent dining room. Smoke damage throughout the first floor. No injuries. Fire marshal report confirms accidental cause.
regulatory_requirements: proof of loss form within 60 days

incident_description: Emergency appendectomy performed at an out-of-network hospital during a road trip. Total billed charges of $42,000 including 2-night hospital stay, surgery, anesthesia, and pathology.
regulatory_requirements: No Surprises Act compliance for emergency services

incident_description: Single-vehicle accident where insured drove into a ditch during a snowstorm. Vehicle sustained frame damage and is likely a total loss. BAC test at the scene registered 0.11, above the legal limit of 0.08.
regulatory_requirements: written denial with specific policy language cited

incident_description: Water damage from a burst pipe during a cold snap while homeowner was on a 3-week vacation. The home heating system was turned off. Extensive water damage to hardwood floors, drywall, and personal property in basement.
regulatory_requirements: reasonable care and maintenance clause analysis
state department of insurance complaint rights

incident_description: Patient seeking coverage for a robotic-assisted knee replacement surgery. Orthopedic surgeon recommends the procedure based on severe osteoarthritis with bone-on-bone contact. Patient has completed 12 weeks of physical therapy and cortisone injections without improvement.
Catalytic converter theft from a parked vehicle in a residential driveway. Police report filed. Replacement cost quoted at $3,200 for parts and labor.

Hail damage to roof and siding following a severe thunderstorm with golf-ball-sized hail. Independent adjuster inspection confirms damage to 24 of 30 roof squares and impact marks on vinyl siding on north and west faces.
regulatory_requirements: depreciation vs replacement cost value election

incident_description: Claim for experimental CAR-T cell therapy for relapsed diffuse large B-cell lymphoma. Patient has failed two prior lines of chemotherapy. Treatment center is an NCI-designated cancer center.

Multi-vehicle pileup on Interstate 95 during fog. Insured's vehicle struck from both front and rear. Three other vehicles involved. Two passengers in insured's vehicle transported to hospital with moderate injuries. Liability disputed among multiple parties.
regulatory_requirements: bodily injury liability limits adequacy review

incident_description: Mold discovered behind bathroom walls during a renovation. Homeowner claims the mold resulted from a slow leak in the shower plumbing that went undetected for approximately 18 months. No prior water damage claims on record.

Insured's teenage driver (listed on policy) struck a pedestrian in a crosswalk while texting. Pedestrian suffered a broken leg and concussion. Police report cites driver distraction. Dashcam footage from a nearby vehicle corroborates.

Lightning strike caused a power surge that destroyed HVAC system, refrigerator, home theater, and two desktop computers. No structural fire but scorch marks at the electrical panel. Electrician confirms surge damage pattern.
regulatory_requirements: actual cash value vs replacement cost election
code upgrade coverage assessment for electrical panel

incident_description: Pre-authorization request for bariatric gastric sleeve surgery. Patient has BMI of 42, documented type 2 diabetes, sleep apnea, and hypertension. Patient has completed required 6-month supervised weight loss program with nutritional counseling.
regulatory_requirements: medical necessity criteria per NIH guidelines

incident_description: Vehicle reported stolen from a shopping mall parking lot. Recovery 3 weeks later in a different state with significant body damage and missing aftermarket parts. GPS data from insured's phone shows insured was at home at the time of reported theft. Social media posts from insured show financial difficulties.
regulatory_requirements: sworn proof of loss under oath
anti-fraud statement on claim form verification
